_publications._publicationTitle: Exploring transcriptional regulators Ref-1 and STAT3 as therapeutic targets in malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumours.

_contextSnippet: We found that malignant transformation of plexiform neurofibroma and ANNUBP precursor tumours to MPNST was associated with significant upregulation of p-STAT3 and Ref-1
details: Malignant transformation of plexiform neurofibroma and ANNUBP precursor tumors to MPNST was associated with significant upregulation of p-STAT3 and Ref-1
